confirm.clear_all_history_settings: Clear all plugin, audio, DAW, preset, PDF, and MIDI scan history? This cannot be undone.
confirm.clear_all_history_tab: Clear all scan history? This cannot be undone.
confirm.clear_all_scan_databases: Clear all scan history databases? This wipes every tab's scanned file list.
help.mouse.drag_samples_desc: Move the pointer before release to drag files into a DAW, Finder, or Desktop; batch selection (where the tab supports it) drags all selected rows
help.play.video_maximize: Fullscreen or restore video (Videos tab; only while a video is loaded)
help.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
menu.decrease_scan_history_keep: Decrease scan history to keep (per type)
menu.increase_scan_history_keep: Increase scan history to keep (per type)

menu.palette_autoplay_source_player: Autoplay next queue: player list (sequential, loops)
menu.palette_autoplay_source_samples: Autoplay next queue: Samples table (sequential, loops)
menu.palette_tray_transport_source_playe: Tray popover prev/next queue: player list (sequential, loops)
menu.palette_tray_transport_source_sampl: Tray popover prev/next queue: Samples table (sequential, loops)
menu.toggle_auto_content_dup_startup: Toggle automatic byte-duplicate scan on startup
menu.toggle_auto_fingerprint_cache_start: Toggle automatic fingerprint cache build on startup
menu.toggle_auto_kvr_check_on_startup: Toggle KVR plugin update check on app startup
menu.toggle_auto_pdf_metadata_on_startup: Toggle automatic PDF metadata extraction on startup
menu.toggle_auto_pdf_scan_startup: Toggle automatic PDF scan on startup (empty library)
menu.toggle_play_sample_on_keyboard_sele: Toggle Play Sample on Keyboard Selection
toast.ae_insert_editor_no_plugin: Select a plug-in in this slot first, then Apply inserts.
toast.ae_plugin_rescan_wiping: Wiping plugin cache and starting fresh scan…
toast.ae_plugin_scan_started: Scanning VST3/AU plug-ins in the background…
toast.ae_plugin_scan_timeout: Plug-in scan is still running after a long wait. Try again or check the Audio Engine tab.
toast.all_scans_reset_fresh: All scans reset to fresh state
toast.all_ui_factory_reset: All UI layout reset to factory defaults — reloading...
toast.batch_analysis_threads_set: BPM/Key/LUFS batch worker threads set to {val} (next batch)
toast.batch_size_set: Batch size set to {val} — restart to apply
toast.bpm_key_lufs_analysis_queue_failed: BPM/Key/LUFS: could not read analysis queue — {err}
toast.bpm_key_lufs_analysis_stopped: BPM/Key/LUFS: stop requested — finishing current batch
toast.building_plugin_index: Starting plugin index in the background…
toast.building_xref_index_all_daw: Building xref index for all DAW projects...
toast.channel_buffer_set: Channel buffer set to {val} — restart to apply
toast.content_dup_cancelled: Byte scan stopped at {done} / {total}: {groups} duplicate group(s), {files} file(s) hashed.
toast.content_dup_done: Byte scan: {groups} duplicate group(s), {files} file(s) hashed.
toast.content_dup_stop_requested: Byte-duplicate scan: stop requested — finishing current chunk
toast.crate_analysis_started: Sample analysis started — categories + packs will populate as results land
toast.crate_waveform_prefetch_started: Waveform prefetch started — peaks will land in SQLite as the job walks the library
toast.fd_limit_set: FD limit set to {val} — restart to apply
toast.fingerprint_build_complete_n_cache: Fingerprint build complete — {built} computed, {cached} cached total
toast.fingerprint_build_stopped: Fingerprint cache build stopped — {built} computed, {cached} total cached
toast.fingerprint_building_n_slow: Building fingerprints for {n} samples (this will take a while)...
toast.garageband_not_found: GarageBand not found — install from App Store
toast.locale_changed: Interface language updated. Restart the app to apply the menu bar language.
toast.no_audio_samples_scan_first: No audio samples loaded. Scan samples first.
toast.no_notes_export: No notes or tags to export
toast.no_scan_dirs: No directories to watch. Add paths under Folder watch directories, or leave that list empty and configure scan directories.
toast.no_xref_build_index: No xref data — build plugin index first
toast.plugin_index_no_daw_projects: No DAW projects in the library. Scan the DAW tab first.
toast.post_scan_all_complete: Scan all complete — {plugins} plugins · {samples} samples · {daw} DAW · {presets} presets · {pdfs} PDFs · {midi} MIDI
toast.post_scan_all_stopped: Scan all stopped — {plugins} plugins · {samples} samples · {daw} DAW · {presets} presets · {pdfs} PDFs · {midi} MIDI
toast.preview_not_supported_format: This format cannot be previewed in the player ({ext})
toast.prune_old_scans_keep_set: Scan history to keep: {val} per type (next launch)
toast.reverse_engine_unsupported: Reverse playback is not available when using the audio engine output path.
toast.reverse_no_track: Load a track to use reverse playback
toast.run_plugin_index_first: Run "Plugin Index" on the DAW tab first.
toast.sample_loop_no_target: No sample selected to set loop on
toast.snapshot_export_dir_cleared: Snapshot export folder cleared (app data snapshots folder)
toast.sqlite_read_pool_extra_set: SQLite read pool: {val} — restart to apply
toast.start_all_background_jobs: Starting all background jobs (analysis, dup scan, PDF scan, PDF metadata, fingerprints, KVR update check)...
toast.stop_all_background_jobs: Stopping all background jobs (analysis, dup scan, PDF scan, PDF metadata, fingerprints, KVR update check)...
toast.tag_bar_hidden_filter: Tag bar hidden (filter still active). Show via Settings.
toast.tag_bar_show_when_active: Tag bar will show when tag is active
toast.thread_multiplier_set: Thread multiplier set to {val}x — restart to apply
toast.video_audio_route: Video audio: {route} — restart or reopen the video to apply
ui.ae.add_insert_slot_tt: Add another insert row (fuzzy search from the plugin scan).
ui.ae.apply_device_tt: Apply the selected output device, buffer, playback settings, and inserts to the audio engine.
ui.ae.apply_inserts_tt: Load the selected plug-ins for library playback. Stop the output stream first.
ui.ae.audio_device_type_tt: JUCE audio device type (CoreAudio, ASIO, JACK, etc.). Changing driver stops active streams and refreshes device lists.
ui.ae.buffer_frames_input_tt: Optional fixed buffer for start_input_stream. The list comes from the selected input device’s supported sizes (get_input_device_info.buffer_sizes). Choose Driver default to omit buffer_frames.
ui.ae.buffer_frames_output_tt: Optional fixed buffer for start_output_stream. The list comes from the selected output device’s supported sizes (get_output_device_info.buffer_sizes). Choose Driver default to omit buffer_frames.
ui.ae.err_no_ipc: Audio engine IPC unavailable (not running in the app shell).
ui.ae.graphs_desc: Real-time scope-derived views of engine output: waveforms (mid, side, L/R overlay, L−R), stereo energy, vectorscope, Lissajous-style L–R line trace, DC offset, magnitude and |L−R| histograms, peak trace, balance, correlation, width, and crest. FFT / spectrogram / band views are on the Visualizer tab.
ui.ae.heading: Audio Engine
ui.ae.input_device_tt: Choose which input is used for the caps readout and for Start input capture. Live capture status and peak update in the engine status card.
ui.ae.insert_editor_tt: Open the native plug-in window for this insert slot. Apply inserts first.
ui.ae.insert_hide_audio_units_tt: AU plugin editor windows are blank in this build because audiocomponentd refuses out-of-process AU view delivery to ad-hoc signed hosts. Hide AUs from the insert picker (default) until the project is signed with a real Developer ID. Turn off if you only need AU audio processing without opening the editor.
ui.ae.insert_show_instruments_tt: When off, the insert picker lists only plug-ins JUCE marks as effects (not synths or samplers). Turn on to include instruments.
ui.ae.insert_slot_tt: Optional VST3 or AU effect (from scan). Order is serial top to bottom.
ui.ae.intro: Low-latency JUCE AudioEngine: pick driver (device type), optional sample rate, then output device — Apply opens an output stream (silence or optional 440 Hz test tone on F32 devices). Input section can start a capture stream (samples discarded until metering/DSP). engine_state returns output `stream` and `input_stream`. Optional buffer_frames applies to both directions. Playback output & EQ mirror the floating player; VST3/AU inserts run after the built-in EQ when you Apply inserts (stop the output stream first).
ui.ae.output_device_tt: System output device for the audio engine
ui.ae.playback_dsp_intro: Same settings as the floating player (saved in preferences). Applies to library playback through the AudioEngine when a track is playing.
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_bands_tt: Number of FFT magnitude bins sent in playback_status (caps at Nyquist for the FFT size).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_cap_hint: At most {max} bands for this FFT size (Nyquist = half the window in points).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_points_tt: FFT window size (points) for the library playback spectrum / visualizer. Larger sizes cost more CPU; Off sends no FFT in the engine.
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_quality_tt: FFT window length (points) and output band count for playback_status during AudioEngine library playback. Larger sizes cost more CPU; Off skips FFT work (visualizer / EQ spectrum fall back to Web Audio or idle).
ui.ae.playback_spectrum_row_tt: FFT window length and how many bands are sent in playback_status. Larger windows cost more CPU; fewer bands reduce IPC payload. Off skips FFT in the engine.
ui.ae.playback_transport_intro: Rodio transport: play/pause, seek ±5s, reverse (same behavior as the floating player).
ui.ae.playback_volume_tt: Output level for AudioEngine library playback (0–100%).
ui.ae.plugin_scan_cache_desc: Per-module timeout for the JUCE scan subprocess. Wipe deletes cache files and starts a full rescan.
ui.ae.plugin_scan_timeout_tt: Seconds per plug-in module before the scan worker kills the child process (5–3600). Saved in preferences as pluginScanTimeoutSec.
ui.ae.plugins_scan_stuck_hint: — Stalled: JUCE may be hung inside this plug-in (not the same as a crash). Restart Audio Engine AudioEngine if this never advances.
ui.ae.plugins_scanning_note: Scanning VST3/AU plug-ins in the background (bad modules are skipped).
ui.ae.plugins_stub: Phase: {phase}. Planned formats: {formats}. Active insert slots: {count}. {note}
ui.ae.process_stats_not_running: AudioEngine subprocess not running yet (spawned on first IPC).
ui.ae.refresh_devices_tt: Reload the system audio device list from the engine.
ui.ae.restart_audioengine_tt: Kill the audio-engine process and spawn a fresh one if it crashed or stopped responding. AudioEngine stream and playback state is reset.
ui.ae.sample_rate_tt: Optional fixed sample rate for start_output_stream and start_input_stream. Options come from the selected output device; leave as driver default if unsure.
ui.ae.start_input_capture_tt: Open JUCE input stream (samples discarded until metering/DSP)
ui.ae.status_applied_stream: Device {id} saved; silence output stream running.
ui.ae.status_row_desc: AudioEngine version, output stream, and input capture status (read-only).
ui.ae.status_stub: Not connected — engine process not implemented yet.
ui.ae.stop_stream_tt: Stop the JUCE output stream (silence or playback)
ui.ae.test_tone_tt: Low-level sine on F32 default stream; toggle live if supported
ui.ae.transport_reverse_tt: Reverse playback — full decode in AudioEngine RAM when enabled (same as floating player)
ui.ae.transport_section_desc: Play/pause, seek ±5s, reverse — same as the floating player.
ui.ae.wipe_rescan_plugins_tt: Delete known-plugin-list.xml and related cache files, then run a full VST3/AU scan (uses the timeout above).
ui.audio.load_more_hint: Showing {shown} of {total} — click to load more
ui.audio.meta_spectrogram_canvas_tt: Spectrogram — low frequencies at bottom, high at top
ui.audio.meta_tt_key: Musical key detected via chromagram analysis
ui.audio.not_playable_in_audio_engine: {ext} is not playable in audio engine
ui.audio.similar_empty: No similar samples found. Scan more samples first.
ui.audio.similar_fp_detail: {cached} already cached for this search — {uncached} to compute. First run is slow; subsequent searches are fast.
ui.audio.similar_fp_status: Computing fingerprints for {uncached} of {total} library samples...
ui.audio.tt_cell_bpm_exhausted: Tempo could not be estimated; background analysis will not retry until the BPM cache is cleared.
ui.audio.tt_sort_modified: Last modified date — click to sort
ui.crate.analysis_tt_start: Detect categories, packs, BPM, key for all samples
ui.crate.audition_empty: Navigate with j/k to audition. Drag any row into your DAW.
ui.crate.keys_hint: j/k or ↑/↓ · space=pause · enter=persist · /=search · esc=stop · drag row to DAW
ui.crate.prefetch_tt_start: Precompute waveform peaks for every library sample — runs in parallel, stored in SQLite so rows never wait
ui.crate.whitelist_desc: Only samples from these directories will be used for generation. Leave empty to use all directories.
ui.daw.no_filter_matches: No DAW projects match the current filter.
ui.dep_graph.analytics_empty: No data to analyze. Build the plugin index first.
ui.dep_graph.confirm_build_index_body: No plugin index data. You must run "Plugin Index" first to scan DAW projects for plugin references. Build the index now?
ui.dep_graph.empty_all_referenced: All installed plugins are referenced in scanned projects.
ui.dep_graph.empty_no_plugins_in_project: No plugins found in this project
ui.dep_graph.title: Plugin Dependency Graph
ui.dep_graph.tt_tab_most_used: Plugins ranked by how many projects use them
ui.dep_graph.tt_tab_orphaned: Installed plugins not used in any scanned project
ui.dup.content_cancelled_note: Partial results ({done} / {total} same-size paths hashed — more duplicates may exist if you run the full scan).
ui.dup.content_cancelled_progress: Progress when stopped: {done} / {total} same-size paths hashed.
ui.dup.content_empty: No byte-identical files found. Files with unique sizes were skipped without reading.
ui.dup.content_hint: Groups paths by stored size (size 0 in the database is skipped—it would merge too many files), then SHA-256. Same bytes count even if names or folders differ. Large libraries may take a while.
ui.dup.name_empty: No name-based duplicates. Plugin copies share the same name; samples/DAW/presets match on name and format.
ui.export.import_empty_audio: File contains no audio samples or is empty.
ui.export.import_empty_daw: File contains no DAW projects or is empty.
ui.export.import_empty_pdfs: File contains no PDFs or is empty.
ui.export.import_empty_plugins: File contains no plugins or is empty.
ui.export.import_empty_presets: File contains no presets or is empty.
ui.export.import_empty_videos: File contains no videos or is empty.
ui.folder_watch_no_scan_dirs: No directories to watch yet. Add paths under Folder watch directories, or leave that list empty and set scan directories above.
ui.fzf.boundary.desc: Bonus for matching at word boundaries
ui.fzf.boundary.label: Word Boundary Bonus
ui.fzf.camel.label: CamelCase Bonus
ui.fzf.consecutive.label: Consecutive Bonus
ui.fzf.first_char_mult.label: First Char Multiplier
ui.fzf.gap_extension.label: Gap Extension
ui.fzf.gap_start.label: Gap Start Penalty
ui.fzf.non_word.label: Non-Word Bonus
ui.fzf.score_match.label: Match Score
ui.history.empty_run_hint: Run a scan to start tracking.
ui.history.select_scan_hint: Select a scan from the sidebar to view details
ui.hm.card_bpm_canvas_title: BPM histogram — wait for background process to populate data
ui.hm.card_bpm_empty: Expand sample rows to populate BPM data
ui.hm.card_key_canvas_title: Musical key distribution — major (cyan) vs minor (magenta)
ui.hm.card_key_empty: Expand sample rows to populate key data
ui.hm.card_timeline_canvas_title: Files modified per month over the last 24 months
ui.hm.partial_sample_rows: Size / folder / timeline charts use the loaded sample page ({shown} of {total} in the library).
ui.hm.title: Audio Heatmap Dashboard
ui.js.discovering_plugin_files: Discovering plugin files across system directories...
ui.js.load_more_hint: Showing {shown} of {total} — click to load more
ui.js.no_plugins_found_body: No VST2, VST3, CLAP, or Audio Unit plugins were found in the standard system directories.
ui.midi.empty_state: No MIDI files found. Run a preset scan to discover .mid files.
ui.opt.name: Name
ui.p.browse_your_filesystem_configure_ro: Browse your filesystem. Configure root directories in Settings > Scanning.
ui.p.daw_empty: Click "Scan DAW Projects" to find all DAW project files (Ableton, Logic, FL Studio, Cubase, REAPER, etc.) on your system.
ui.p.favorites_empty: Right-click any plugin, sample, DAW project, or preset and choose "Add to Favorites".
ui.p.notes_empty: Right-click any plugin, sample, DAW project, or preset and choose "Add Note".
ui.p.pdfs_empty: Click "Scan PDFs" to find PDF documents on your system.
ui.p.presets_empty: Click "Scan Presets" to discover VST/AU/DAW presets on your system.
ui.p.preview_and_approve_the_main_sample: Preview and approve the main samples. Click shuffle to pick a different sample.
ui.p.samples_empty: Click "Scan Samples" to find all audio files (WAV, MP3, AIFF, FLAC, etc.) on your system.
ui.p.select_a_scan_from_the_sidebar_to_v: Select a scan from the sidebar to view details
ui.p.tags_empty: Right-click any item and choose "Add Note" to add tags, or use the quick-tag menu.
ui.p.videos_empty: Click "Scan Videos" to find video files on your system.
ui.p.welcome_scan_intro: Click "Scan Plugins" or "Scan All" to discover everything on your system.
ui.perf.line_db_library: Library (unique paths): {samples} samples | {plugins} plugins | {daw} DAW | {presets} presets | {midi} MIDI | {pdfs} PDFs
ui.perf.line_db_read_pool: SQLite read pool: {total} file handles ({extra} extra) — pref: {pref}
ui.perf.line_db_scans: Scans: {plugin_scans} plugin | {audio_scans} audio | {daw_scans} DAW | {preset_scans} preset | {midi_scans} midi | {pdf_scans} pdf
ui.perf.line_db_tables: Table rows (raw): {samples} samples | {plugins} plugins | {daw} DAW | {presets} presets | {midi} midi | {pdfs} pdfs
ui.scheme.arctic.label: Arctic
ui.scheme.cyberpunk.label: Cyberpunk
ui.scheme.ember.label: Ember
ui.scheme.matrix.label: Matrix
ui.scheme.midnight.label: Midnight
ui.sd.additional_directories_to_scan_for: Additional directories to scan for audio samples (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for DAW project files (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for MIDI files (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for PDF documents (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for plugin presets (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for plugins (one per line)
Additional directories to scan for video files (one per line)
ui.sd.als_seed: Lock the seed to regenerate the same arrangement
ui.sd.animated_pulsing_neon_borders_on_p: Animated pulsing neon borders on panels, modals, and tiles
ui.sd.app_log_verbosity_desc: Quiet omits high-volume scan diagnostics (network dedup, mount traces). Normal logs everything. Verbose is reserved for future extra detail.
ui.sd.auto_content_dup_on_startup: When on, start the SHA-256 byte-duplicate scan after the app finishes loading library counts (default off).
ui.sd.auto_fingerprint_cache_on_startup: When on, start fingerprint cache build for the audio library after load (CPU-heavy; default off).
ui.sd.auto_kvr_check_on_startup: When on, run one plugin update check after the app loads the plugin database (separate from “after auto-scan”). Default off.
ui.sd.auto_pdf_metadata_on_startup: When on, start a full background PDF page-count pass once after startup (independent of the PDF tab). Default off.
ui.sd.auto_pdf_scan_on_startup: When on and PDF scan roots are configured, run Scan PDFs once at launch if the indexed PDF count is zero (default off).
ui.sd.automatically_check_for_plugin_upd: Automatically check for plugin updates after scanning
ui.sd.automatically_play_the_next_sample: Automatically play the next sample when the current one ends
ui.sd.automatically_run_bpm_key_lufs_ana: When on, run BPM/Key/LUFS batches as the library loads and scans complete. Default off — use Run analysis for manual runs.
ui.sd.automatically_scan_for_plugins_whe: Automatically scan for plugins when the app starts
ui.sd.autoplay_next_source: When autoplay next is on, advance through the floating player list (loops) or visible Samples rows (loops)
ui.sd.autoplay_the_selected_sample_when_: Autoplay the selected sample when you move the selection with arrow keys or j/k on the Samples tab
ui.sd.batch_analysis_threads: Rayon workers per background analysis batch (1–16). Lower leaves more CPU for playback. Applies on the next batch.
ui.sd.bg_job_throttle: How much to slow background jobs during audio playback. Full Pause is best for network shares (SMB/NFS over WiFi). Off is fine for local SSD.
ui.sd.bpm_key_lufs_analysis: Analyze files that do not have BPM, key, and loudness yet — same background job as idle analysis
ui.sd.clear_saved_table_column_sizes_and: Clear saved table column sizes and restore defaults
ui.sd.click_a_sample_row_to_start_playba: Click a sample row to start playback instead of requiring double-click
ui.sd.content_dup_hash_threads: Rayon workers for SHA-256 duplicate chunks (1–32). Separate from the global scan pool. Applies on the next scan.
ui.sd.content_dup_scan: SHA-256 scan for byte-identical files (same controls as the Duplicates modal — runs in the background)
ui.sd.create_your_own_color_scheme_by_pi: Create your own color scheme by picking colors below
ui.sd.directory_names_to_skip_during_sca: Directory names to skip during scans (one per line). Applies to all scanners.
ui.sd.double_click_a_sample_row_to_expan: Double-click a sample row to expand/collapse metadata. Setting is toggled automatically by double-click
ui.sd.folder_watch_directories: Paths to watch (one per line). Leave empty to use plugin scan dirs plus all library scan dirs below. If you add any path here, only this list is watched.
ui.sd.folder_watch_scan_paths_explainer: Paths to watch (one per line). Leave empty to use plugin scan dirs plus all library scan dirs. If you add any path here, only this list is watched.
ui.sd.frame_rate_cap_for_the_visualizer_: Frame rate cap for the visualizer tab (lower = less CPU)
ui.sd.generate_midi_tracks: Generate MIDI tracks for melodic layers (pad, lead, arp, bass)
ui.sd.how_audio_samples_are_ordered_afte: How audio samples are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_daw_projects_are_ordered_after: How DAW projects are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_midi_files_are_ordered_after_s: How MIDI files are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_pdf_files_are_ordered_after_sc: How PDFs are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_plugins_are_ordered_after_scan: How plugins are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.how_presets_are_ordered_after_scan: How presets are ordered after scanning
ui.sd.include_als_files_from_ableton_s_b: Include .als files from Ableton's Backup and Crash directories in DAW scan results
ui.sd.incremental_directory_scan: When on, skip subtrees whose directory mtime is unchanged since the last complete unified scan (faster). Turn off to always walk the full tree.
ui.sd.ipc_buffer_capacity_between_scan_t: IPC buffer capacity between scan threads and UI. Higher = less blocking. Restart required.
ui.sd.items_per_batch_sent_from_scanner_: Items per batch sent from scanner to UI. Larger = fewer IPC calls. Restart required.
ui.sd.max_cached_waveforms_in_memory_hig: Max cached waveforms in memory (higher = more RAM)
ui.sd.max_open_files_per_process_raise_i: Max open files per process. Raise if scans abort on large libraries or network shares. Restart required.
ui.sd.minimum_ms_between_dom_updates_dur: Minimum ms between DOM updates during scans (lower = smoother, higher = faster)
ui.sd.number_of_rows_to_render_per_page_: Number of rows to render per page in audio/DAW tables
ui.sd.number_of_tracks_to_keep_in_the_pl: Number of tracks to keep in the play history
ui.sd.open_the_app_s_preferences_databas: Open the app's preferences, database, and log directory in Finder
ui.sd.open_the_preferences_toml_file_in_: Open the preferences TOML file in your default editor
ui.sd.place_the_tag_filter_bar_above_or_: Place the tag filter bar above or below tabs
ui.sd.plugin_type_to_show_by_default_aft: Plugin type to show by default after scanning
ui.sd.prune_old_scans: On startup (after a delay), remove older completed scan runs except the last N per scanner type. Turn off to keep all history (larger DB). Next launch applies.
ui.sd.prune_old_scans_keep: Number of most recent completed scans retained per type (plugins, samples, DAW, presets, MIDI, PDF) when pruning is on.
ui.sd.remove_all_plugin_audio_and_daw_sc: Remove all plugin, audio, and DAW scan history
ui.sd.remove_cached_version_lookups_next: Remove cached version lookups — next check will re-fetch all
ui.sd.reset_all_sizing_positioning_order: Reset ALL sizing, positioning, ordering, and layout to factory defaults. Clears tab order, column order/widths, section order, modal positions, player dock, stat bar order, toolbar order, dashboard card order, and all drag-reorder prefs. Requires reload.
ui.sd.restore_default_settings_section_o: Restore default settings section order (drag headings to rearrange)
ui.sd.restore_the_default_tab_order_drag: Restore the default tab order (drag tabs to rearrange)
ui.sd.save_all_preferences_and_keyboard_: Save all preferences and keyboard shortcuts to a text file
ui.sd.save_the_error_crash_log_file_for_: Save the error/crash log file for debugging
ui.sd.seconds_of_idle_before_background_: Seconds of idle before background BPM/Key/LUFS analysis resumes
ui.sd.show_hide_the_tag_filter_bar_when_: Show/hide the tag filter bar when a tag is active
ui.sd.show_the_audio_player_when_the_app: Show the player when the app starts (restores last playing state)
ui.sd.snapshot_export_dir: PNG snapshots from the Visualizer tab and Audio Engine graphs save here when set. Leave empty to use the default download location.
ui.sd.sqlite_read_pool_extra: Extra read-only DB connections for parallel queries (WAL). 0 = automatic. Uses more RAM when higher. Restart required.
ui.sd.switch_between_dark_cyberpunk_and_: Switch between dark cyberpunk and clean light mode
ui.sd.threads_per_cpu_core_for_parallel_: Threads per CPU core for parallel scans. Higher = more I/O throughput. Restart required.
ui.sd.tooltip_hover_delay: Milliseconds to wait before showing title tooltips (0 = immediate). Uses a custom layer; native WebKit delay is not configurable.
ui.sd.tray_transport_source: Which list the menubar tray popover's prev/next buttons walk through — independent of the EOF autoplay queue above
ui.sd.video_audio_route: AudioEngine: same path as samples (EQ, inserts, spectrum). WebView: decode in the browser (less RAM on huge files; plugins do not apply).
ui.sd.watch_scan_directories_for_new_cha: Watch scan directories for new/changed files and auto-index them
ui.sd.when_on_resolve_pdf_page_counts_in: When on, resolve PDF page counts in the background while the PDF tab is open (including on launch if that tab is restored). When off, use Command Palette → Start PDF metadata for a full pass; the table still shows values already in the database.
ui.sd.wipe_all_scan_results_history_and_: Wipe all scan results, history, and KVR cache. Start completely fresh
